description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height:27cm Width: 32cm Depth: 14cm Leatherette upper for durability One main compartment with a zippered pocket, a zippered separator and a mobile pouch Two short handles Zippered pocket on the back Stitched detailing on the front Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
